WRONGFUL DISCHARGE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONTI, REBECCA L AS TO DEFENDANT NIKE CORPORATION MCCONNELL, PAM NEWELL-HALL, NEKEDA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-08-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-05-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-10-2002

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-23-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-08-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST GILBERT L. PURCELL, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-01-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-16-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DEBORAH LUBIN, CSR #3234. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
